calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Carton, Esq. for, Appellant/ defendant who is present.
Maleena Reed Respondents/ Plaintiffs with witness Tommie Andrews.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Maleena Reed testifies on her own behalf.
Exhibit A: Letter to Brama Swami from Malen Reed, dated 6/01/12.

Mark Carton conducts cross examination on behalf of the appellant.
Exhibit 1: Grant Deed
Exhibit 2: Cash for Keys
Exhibit 4: Small Claims Petition
Exhibit 5: Notice of Change of Address
Exhibit 6: Ex parte Application re: Demurrer 640713

Tommie Andrews testifies on behalf of the Respondent.
Cross examination by Mark Carton, on behalf of appellant.
The Court poses questions to Maleena Reed.

Brama Swamiis examined by Mark Carton.
Exhibit3: Cashier's Check in the amount of $500.00

The Court finds a lack of credibility with the testimony of the Appellant and will award $5,000. to the the respondent, Maleena Reed.

All exhibits are returned to the sumbitting parties.
This matter is adjourned
Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not reported (613)
